mapper.select: SELECT e.station_id, s.name AS station_name, c.region, s.sort_index, e.biz_date, e.hour_slot, e.forecast_type, e.error_kw, e.qualified FROM fc_error_sample e JOIN sa_station s ON s.id = e.station_id JOIN sa_company c ON c.id = s.company_id WHERE e.biz_date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} ORDER BY e.biz_date, s.sort_index, e.forecast_type, e.hour_slot
